rows.label: tev001894_MSG0001
rows.name: How's it going, Chief?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001894_MSG0002
rows.name: This is your kitty cat, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001894_MSG0003
rows.name: Aw, man! Lucky! I wish I had a pet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001894_MSG0004
rows.name:
I've never had one. Not even when I was a kid.
But I guess there's nothing stopping me now,
huh? So what do you think I should get?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001894_JNK0010
rows.name: Say "Cat"

rows.label: tev001894_SEL0011
rows.name:
Tell Miia that a cat would
suit her perfectly.

rows.label: tev001894_JNK0020
rows.name: Say "Dog"

rows.label: tev001894_SEL0021
rows.name:
Suggest Miia get a good
and faithful dog.

rows.label: tev001894_JNK0030
rows.name: Say "Nopon"

rows.label: tev001894_SEL0031
rows.name:
Tell Miia that Nopon
are all the rage now.

rows.label: tev001894_MSG0005
rows.name:
Huh? What do you mean, a cat would "suit me"? Is it
because I like playing with yarn? Because I do. But
really, who doesn't enjoy a nice ball of yarn?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001894_MSG0006
rows.name:
Or is it because of my name? You know. Miia? Meow?
All the mechanics used to think it was soooooo funny
to say "Well, Miia-YOOOOW!" whenever I got angry.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001894_MSG0007
rows.name:
Yeah, no. I think a cat is too
predictable. Although I guess
we'd have a lot in common...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001894_MSG0008
rows.name: A dog, huh? Yeah, dogs are cool.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001894_MSG0009
rows.name:
I could throw a tennis ball for it
on my day off... It would lick my
face when I got up in the morning...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001894_MSG0010
rows.name:
That might be the perfect partner
for a lonely girl living all by
herself on a strange weirdo planet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001894_MSG0011
rows.name: Nopon aren't pets, Chief.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001894_MSG0012
rows.name:
Although I did give that "Tatsu" Nopon
of yours a can of tuna once—thing followed
me around for the rest of the day.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001894_MSG0013
rows.name:
Still, you can't treat Nopon
like pets. They're people just
like us! Er, for the most part.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001894_MSG0014
rows.name:
Still, I hear that I can't get ANY pet
without official permission first.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001894_MSG0015
rows.name:
You've done all sorts of great things,
Chief, so you probably didn't even
need to apply for permission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001894_MSG0016
rows.name:
But ol' Miia is starting
from square one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001894_MSG0017
rows.name:
That means I have to complete 1,000
BLADE missions AND own a house. And
that just gets me an interview![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001894_MSG0018
rows.name:
Not to mention that this little
kitten is a state-of-the-art,
precision piece of machinery.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001894_MSG0019
rows.name:
These things cost more than a car, right?
I probably can't even afford one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001894_MSG0020
rows.name:
You know what? When I feel lonely, I'm
just gonna come bug you at your floor
of the Home and ask to pet your cat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001894_MSG0021
rows.name:
Be seeing you, Chief. Probably
more than you'd like![ST:wait ]
